title: bursera hollickii
intro: Bursera hollickii, also known as the Coastal Paper Tree or Maikaika, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae, native to the coastal areas of the Hawaiian Islands. The medicinal properties of Bursera hollickii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and fungal infections. The health benefits of Bursera hollickii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antimicrobial protection, which can help prevent infections and promote overall health. The herbal preparations of Bursera hollickii typically involve infusing the leaves and bark in water or oil to make teas, tinctures, or salves that can be used topically or internally for medicinal purposes.
